reflection.candidate_lesson: When internal regime disagrees with or lacks external TradingView confirmation (0 TV signals), the 75% sizing multiplier should be a hard trade GATE below a consensus conviction floor, not just a size reduction — internal-only MOMENTUM signals with pair conviction < 50% are noise-dominated.
reflection.mechanism: Internal momentum detection without independent external confirmation reflects a single sensor firing; institutionally, durable directional flow leaves footprints across multiple venues/feeds. When only the internal system sees MOMENTUM and TV sees nothing, the signal is more likely to be an intrabar artifact than committed order flow, so sizing down still exposes capital to a coin-flip.
reflection.testable_rule: if external_confirmation.tv_signals == 0 and regime == 'MOMENTUM' and pair_consensus_conv < 0.50: veto_trade() else if sizing_multiplier <= 0.75: proceed_at_reduced_size()

validation.reason: Rule filters only 0 trades — insufficient sample
